prompt: A trading card frame template for a deckbuilding card game, dark fantasy treasure/wealth theme, portrait orientation. Empty card frame with NO TEXT and NO LETTERS anywhere. Ornate gold and bronze border with engraved coin patterns and gemstone inlays. Top section: rectangular nameplate slot (empty engraved gold plate). Center: large empty rectangular illustration window framed in polished gold. Bottom section: empty description panel made of aged tan parchment. Bottom row: two small distinct circular icon slots side by side — left is a golden coin slot (empty), right is a faceted blue crystal shard slot (empty). Color palette: rich gold, warm bronze, deep brown leather, sapphire blue accents. Centered composition. NO TEXT, NO WRITING, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS.
